name: Kridhan Infra Limited
summary: Kridhan Infra Limited manufactures and sells ready to use steel products for the construction and infrastructure sectors in India and internationally. The company offers bridge expansion joints for asphalt and concrete connection; and rebar mechanical couplers. It also provides bored piling, driven piling, micro piling and soil improvement, and soil investigation services. The company was formerly known as Readymade Steel India Limited and changed its name to Kridhan Infra Limited in June 2014. Kridhan Infra Limited was founded in 2006 and is based in Mumbai, India.
